title: Limitations
doc_html:
§942.6.  Limitations

A person electing to participate in the alternative contribution plan shall never be eligible to transfer out of the alternative contribution plan to become a member of the regular plan.

Acts 2001, No. 1055, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
